Chapters: [0:00](https://x.com/opensea/status/2057506958912188642?t=0) Art Meets Community [0:37](https://x.com/opensea/status/2057506958912188642?t=37)

OpenSea Your portfolio shouldn't live in five tabs. All your wallets. All your assets. One feed. NFTs and tokens, now together in one place 5 years ago, I released my first collection on . That drop opened my mind to an onchain art movement that was just beginning. On June 3, I return with [GLiFS.art](https://t.co/Yy7ShJrymq) This time, the collection won’t be complete without your participation.

OpenSea GLiFS by @Efdotstudio 300 symbols 3,000 collector-made compositions. One shared visual language. Drops June 3 opensea.io/collection/gli buying an onchain agent with Face ID hits different… mobile meets Today, I want to share that I’ve been a mobile tester for OpenSea for over a month now. The whole team has been working hard — fixing the bugs we report, adding the features we suggest, and ...

It was late, midnight, and it was beautiful. Some friends, about 15 blocks away, called: "come over?" It was late, it was cold, was tired, thought "maybe not worth it" but then... 1/ There are no other const...

! Below are the facts & my conclusion  RT to spread awareness Read on ...
